display.purpose: Hero name only. One per page, tight and large.

headline.purpose: Section/page headers and full-screen nav links.

lead.purpose: The italic 'said-aloud' opening statement of a section.

label.purpose: Section labels, kickers, tags, ledger meta. The readout voice.

shadows.name: alive-glow
shadows.purpose: Teal glow on a living specimen / active music cover. A state, never ambient.

shadows.name: cost-glow
shadows.purpose: Blood glow on the Tower specimen. Signals weight / cost.

shadows.name: topbar-veil
shadows.purpose: The only blur in the system; fixed top bar only.

motion.name: ease-s
motion.purpose: Slower expressive easing for overlay/menu and reveals.

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The recurring gold mono label with a leading hairline. Replaces the banned eyebrow-kicker as a deliberate system unit.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.9rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #d4a574; } .ds-section-label::before { content: ''; width: 1.6rem; height: 1px; background: #d4a574; opacity: 0.6; }

components.name: Contact Link
components.description: Signature interaction: a 1px gold underline draws in from the left on hover while text warms to gold.
components.css: .ds-contact-link { position: relative; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 400; color: #cdd6f4; text-decoration: none; transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-contact-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #d4a574; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right center; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-contact-link:hover { color: #d4a574; } .ds-contact-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left center; } .ds-contact-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d4a574; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Ghost circular icon control; ring and glyph warm toward gold on hover/focus.
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.7rem; height: 1.7rem; padding: 0; background: none; border: 1px solid #26263a; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; color: #585b70; transition: border-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover, .ds-theme-toggle:focus-visible { border-color: #d4a574; color: #d4a574; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212,165,116,0.12); outline: none; } .ds-toggle-dot { width: 0.6rem; height: 0.6rem; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Full-screen overlay link at Fraunces headline scale; masked and translated in with staggered delay.
components.css: .ds-nav-mask { display: block; overflow: hidden; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 7vw, 4.25rem); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.18; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #cdd6f4; text-decoration: none; transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #d4a574; }

components.name: Ledger Row
components.description: Work/projects as a machine-log row: date, gold glyph, title, role, tags; gold left-border draws on hover.
components.css: .ds-ledger-row { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem 1rem 1rem 1.25rem; border-top: 1px solid #1b1b2a; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-ledger-row::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 2px; background: #d4a574; transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: bottom; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-ledger-row:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); transform-origin: top; } .ds-ledger-date { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #585b70; } .ds-ledger-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 1.15rem; color: #cdd6f4; } .ds-ledger-glyph { color: #d4a574; } .ds-ledger-role { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.66rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9399b2; margin-left: auto; }

components.name: Specimen Card
components.description: Worldbuilding/Taste specimen: no card chrome, a glowing left rule and kind-tag in the specimen's glow color. Never nested.
components.html:
Lucky Boy

organism · viral

A body that rewrites itself faster than it can heal.
components.css: .ds-specimen { position: relative; padding: 0.2rem 0 0.2rem 0; } .ds-specimen-name { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #cdd6f4; text-shadow: 0 0 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--glow) 45%, transparent); } .ds-specimen-kind { display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.5rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--glow); } .ds-specimen-logic { margin: 1.4rem 0 0; padding-left: 1rem; border-left: 1px solid var(--glow); font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #cdd6f4; }

narrative.overview: A dark workshop. The page is cooled metal — near-black inks borrowed from Catppuccin Mocha — and the design only lights up where work is happening: a strip of gold under a section label, a single hover that draws a line, the teal glow on a specimen that's alive. The engineer comes first; mono labels read like machine readouts, the Fraunces serif sets the human statements the engineer chooses to make out loud. The site is the proof — its restraint and finish are the portfolio. The forge is quiet, not cold: warmth comes from the gold's hand-mixed tone and Fraunces' optical contrast. One room breaks the rule on purpose — the Dance/Garba surface detonates into marigold, magenta, and indigo — and that contrast only reads because everywhere else holds restraint.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first (#11111b); light 'ritual paper' parchment is secondary; both pass AA independently.
Gold is rationed — rare and earned, never structural wallpaper.
Mono for labels/readouts, serif for statements, sans for prose — three voices, one hand.
Motion serves comprehension and atmosphere; never scroll-jacks; always has a reduced-motion path.
Legible to a stranger in seconds; layered with depth for the friend who keeps scrolling.

rules.name: The Earned-Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold appears on ≤10% of any screen and only on ritual moments: a section label, the active link, one hover, a focus ring. Its scarcity is the entire effect.

rules.name: The Containment Rule
rules.body: The Garba trio and Taste mauve are quarantined to their own rooms (Dance; Books/Taste). They never leak into the shared chrome.

rules.name: The Three-Voices Rule
rules.body: Mono labels, serif statements, sans prose. Each has one job; mixing the voices muddies the hand.

rules.name: The Tight-Display Rule
rules.body: Display and headline serif always set with negative tracking (≥ −0.04em floor) and sub-1.0 line-height. Loose default-tracked large serif reads as a stock template.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Drop Rule
rules.body: If you reach for a grey box-shadow to lift a card, climb the ink ramp instead. Shadows in this system are colored and meaningful (alive / cost), never neutral and decorative.

dos: Do ration gold to ritual moments only — ≤10% of any screen.
Do keep the three type voices separate: mono labels, Fraunces statements, DM Sans prose.
Do set display/headline serif tight — negative tracking (≥ −0.04em floor), sub-1.0 line-height.
Do convey depth by climbing the ink ramp; reserve box-shadow for meaningful teal/blood glows.
Do verify --ash-dim (#9399b2) hits ≥4.5:1 on its ink background; keep --ash-faint for large/non-essential text only.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative and keep content visible by default.
Do quarantine the Garba trio and Taste mauve to their own pages.
donts: Don't build a dev-bro terminal portfolio — no neon-green-on-black, no matrix rain.
Don't ship overdesigned award-site excess — no scroll-jacking, no motion that buries content.
Don't put an all-caps tracked eyebrow above every section; the gold section-label is the one deliberate unit.
Don't add 01/02/03 numbered section markers unless the content is a genuine ordered sequence.
Don't use gradient text or border-left/right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use glassmorphism anywhere except the fixed top bar.
Don't introduce cream/sand/parchment as the dark mode's surface; the canonical mode is ink near-black.
Don't nest specimen cards or let any accent leak outside its room.
